hero.title: STAAMINA MAKES MALFUNCTIONS MANAGEABLE.

hero.description: BREAKDOWNS ARE COSTLY. LACK OF VISIBILITY COSTS EVEN MORE.

features.title: FEATURES BUILT FOR COLLECTIVE PERFORMANCE
features.subtitle: Every feature aligns your teams and accelerates execution.

aiDeclaration.title: AI-Assisted Incident Reporting
aiDeclaration.description: Simply describe the problem — Staamina structures the information and triggers the right process automatically.

intelligentRouting.description: Incidents are automatically routed to the right responder, via the right channel, through the right process.

carousel.subtitleLine1: **STAAMINA** IS BUILT TO HANDLE ALL **BUSINESS SPECIFICITIES**,
carousel.detailDescription: ONE PLATFORM TO MANAGE INFRASTRUCTURE MAINTENANCE ACROSS ALL YOUR SECTORS.

retail.introDescription: In retail networks, performance depends on always-operational infrastructure. Staamina centralizes, tracks, and streamlines maintenance across all your point-of-sale equipment.

restaurant.introDescription: In the food service industry, any equipment failure can disrupt service and damage the customer experience. Staamina helps teams maintain critical infrastructure continuity — from front of house to kitchen.

fitness.introDescription: In fitness and leisure facilities, equipment availability is directly tied to member satisfaction. Staamina ensures fast incident response and reliable maintenance across all your venues.

agencies.introDescription: In service networks, infrastructure reliability is directly tied to customer service quality. Staamina gives you a centralized view of maintenance across all your branches.

health.introDescription: In health and proximity establishments, every malfunction matters. Staamina ensures reliable tracking and maintenance of all equipment critical to proper site operation.

hospitality.introDescription: In hospitality, infrastructure continuity is a cornerstone of guest satisfaction. Staamina centralizes maintenance operations to keep every site running flawlessly.

problemStatement.text: MANAGING A STORE IS COMPLEX. ACROSS A NETWORK, COMPLEXITY BECOMES EXPONENTIAL. YOUR OPERATIONS SHOULDN'T BE.

beforeAfter.title: STAAMINA STRUCTURES AND SIMPLIFIES OPERATIONS — FROM INCIDENT DECLARATION TO RESOLUTION.
beforeAfter.row1line2: RESOLVING AN INCIDENT SHOULD NOT BE AN OBSTACLE COURSE.
beforeAfter.row2line2: ONE SINGLE ENTRY POINT FOR ALL YOUR INCIDENTS.

items.question: Is Staamina suited to my company size?
items.answer: Staamina adapts to all network sizes — whether you have 5 or 500 locations. The platform is designed to scale with your organisation, with no added cost or complexity.

items.question: How quickly can Staamina be deployed?
items.answer: Deployment is fast. A standard network is up and running in under 2 weeks. Our team guides you through every step: configuration, training, and go-live.

items.question: Do I need to install software on each device?
items.answer: No. Staamina runs entirely in a web browser or via WhatsApp — no installation required on existing workstations or devices. A mobile PWA is available for field technicians.

items.question: How does Staamina integrate with our existing tools?
items.answer: Staamina offers native connectors for major HR, ERP, and CMMS platforms. An open API enables integration with any tool in your ecosystem.

items.question: Is our data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Data is hosted in Europe, strictly isolated per client (multi-tenant architecture), and fully GDPR compliant. No data is ever shared between tenants.

items.question: Does Staamina work offline?
items.answer: The technician mobile app is built as a PWA with full offline support. Any actions taken without a connection are automatically synced once the network is restored.

seo.title: Staamina — Intelligent Maintenance Management for Retail Networks
seo.description: Staamina centralizes, automates, and streamlines maintenance operations across your locations. Real-time monitoring, smart routing, and complete traceability — built for multi-site networks.
